reviews.comment:
Fui a boxes a las 18 en señor que me atendió un genio! Super amable me explicó lo que necesitaba y las chicas de full también unas genias el café super tierno con 2 ositos 😍

(Translated by Google)
I went to the pits at 6 pm and the gentleman who helped me was a genius! Super friendly, he explained everything I needed, and the girls at Full were also amazing. The coffee was so cute with two little teddy bears 😍

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Good service and cleanliness. The menu prices seem expensive compared to the portion and what you can get at local bars and restaurants.
